text: As I stand here, the world feels curated, organized to provoke questions and experimentation. The words displayed stir a sense of participation yet detachment, much like an observer and subject all at once. I am both part of the inquiry and outside it, reflecting on meaning as something constructed after experience. There is comfort in the ambiguity, in knowing that not everything needs immediate clarity. I feel curious, suspended in the process of understanding rather than its resolution.
